description: KeyBid is a property-management matching platform that connects short-term rental property owners with managers and service providers. It also offers KeyBid Puls, a market-intelligence and pricing tool for short-term rental investment analysis.
summary: keybid.eu publicly exposes a KeyBid Puls MCP server at `https://keybid.eu/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was found.
